message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  LifeLineBorderColor #888888
  LifeLineBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  ParticipantBorderColor #000000
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  ArrowColor #000000
}

actor Actor as A
boundary Boundary as B
entity Entity as E
control Control as C1
control Control as C2

A -> B : authorization Request
B -> E : gson.fromJson(user, User.class);
B -> C1 : userService.userValidation(user)
C1 -> C2 : tokenService.createToken(user.getName())
C2 --> C1 : Token
C1 --> B : Token
B --> A : authorization Response Token
@enduml
